verses.text: Joshua sends two spies to Jericho; they lodge with Rahab. The spies. The land is surveyed.
Joshua sends two spies to Jericho; they lodge with Rahab. The spies. The land is surveyed.
Joshua sends two spies to Jericho; they lodge with Rahab. The spies. The land is surveyed.
Rahab hides them and sends the king's men astray. Hidden. She risks all for Israel's God.
Rahab hides them and sends the king's men astray. Hidden. She risks all for Israel's God.
Rahab hides them and sends the king's men astray. Hidden. She risks all for Israel's God.
Rahab hides them and sends the king's men astray. Hidden. She risks all for Israel's God.
She confesses, 'the LORD your God, he is God in heaven above.' Faith. She believes the reports of His power.
She confesses, 'the LORD your God, he is God in heaven above.' Faith. She believes the reports of His power.
She confesses, 'the LORD your God, he is God in heaven above.' Faith. She believes the reports of His power.
She confesses, 'the LORD your God, he is God in heaven above.' Faith. She believes the reports of His power.
She asks for a token of mercy for her house. Mercy. Faith seeks salvation.
She asks for a token of mercy for her house. Mercy. Faith seeks salvation.
She asks for a token of mercy for her house. Mercy. Faith seeks salvation.
She lets them down by a cord through the window. Escape. She aids their flight.
She lets them down by a cord through the window. Escape. She aids their flight.
The scarlet line shall mark her house for sparing. The line. A token of deliverance, like the passover blood.
The scarlet line shall mark her house for sparing. The line. A token of deliverance, like the passover blood.
The scarlet line shall mark her house for sparing. The line. A token of deliverance, like the passover blood.
The scarlet line shall mark her house for sparing. The line. A token of deliverance, like the passover blood.
The scarlet line shall mark her house for sparing. The line. A token of deliverance, like the passover blood.
The spies return and report God has delivered the land. Reported. Faith stirs courage.
The spies return and report God has delivered the land. Reported. Faith stirs courage.
